_doc: Σ₀ local-model adapter registry. Operator-editable overlay onto the built-in defaults in apps/lantern-garage/lib/local-model-registry.js (merged by id, TTL-cached ~60s). See docs/SIGMA0-MODEL-ADAPTER.md. keystone-sigma0-plt (the LoopCoder-V2-lineage owned PLT coder, ADR-0011) is now the SOLE local coder/default and serves on its own ollama-compatible shim at :11435 (models/keystone-sigma0-plt/serve_keystone_plt.py). The kernel stays Ouro/keystone-ft on :11434; Three Doors keeps lantern-csf-dream on :11434. Per-model endpoints are honored by endpointFor(). vramGB gates against the box (VRAM_BUDGET_GB, default 8).

models.note: Sole local Σ₀ coder (ADR-0011, LoopCoder-V2 lineage). Default for coding/reasoning/default. Serve: python models/keystone-sigma0-plt/serve_keystone_plt.py --model D:/keystone-sigma0-plt-ckpt --port 11435 --dtype 4bit. On-box (RTX 3070): loads 4-bit ~6.4GB<8, ~5-6 tok/s (static KV cache). verified:false kept honestly until an eval WIN over a frontier coder; if the shim is down the chain falls back to cloud, not another local model.
Σ₀ Convergence-Core kernel — Ouro-1.4B, native Q-exit (arXiv 2510.25741). Kernel-only; no longer competes on coding/default.
Keystone kernel fine-tune of Ouro (kernel chain lead, #894).
Dream/RP-tuned model — Three Doors surface only (never a tool assistant).
